source.query:
SELECT dd.dmsDocumentId, dd.claimNumber, ddd.type as document_type, ddd.subType as subtype, dd.documentName, dd.fileName as document_fileName, dda.name as attached_To, dd.createDate, dd.documentDate, dd.createBy,
"Unknown" as paymentStatus, now() as create_ts
FROM dms_core.DmsDocument dd,
dms_core.DmsDocumentDetail ddd,
dms_core.DmsDocumentAttachTo dda
WHERE dd.dmsDocumentId = dda.dmsDocumentId 
and ddd.dmsDocumentId = dda.dmsDocumentId
and ddd.type = 'Claim'
and ddd.subType IN ('Estimate of Damages','BI/UM Demand')
order by dd.createDate desc

SELECT id, uuid, pm_cr_payment_id, pm_ip_payment_id, pm_amount, pm_funded, pm_status, pm_paid_date, pm_cleared_date, pm_escheat_date, pm_check_print_date, pm_check_number, pm_mail_tracking_number, pm_method_id, pm_monitored, pm_reject_payee_id, pm_reject_reason, pm_new_method, pm_orig_method, pm_selection, pm_method_last4digit, pm_re_issue, pm_error_code, pm_error_message, pm_carrier_id, pm_env, request_json, created_by, created_date
FROM vsp_core.int_claims_payments_audit

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    dd.aws_document_id      AS dmsDocumentId,
    dd.claim_number         AS claimNumber,
    ddd.type                AS document_type,
    ddd.subType             AS subtype,
    dd.document_name        AS documentName,
    dd.file_name            AS document_fileName,
    dda.name                AS attached_To,
    dd.created_date         AS createDate,
    dd.document_date        AS documentDate,
    dd.created_by           AS createBy,
    'Unknown'               AS paymentStatus,
    GETDATE()               AS create_ts
FROM dms_document dd
JOIN DmsDocumentAttachTo dda
    ON dd.aws_document_id = dda.dmsDocumentId
JOIN DmsDocumentDetail ddd
    ON ddd.dmsDocumentId = dda.dmsDocumentId
WHERE ddd.type = 'Claim'
  AND ddd.subType IN ('Estimate of Damages', 'BI/UM Demand')
ORDER BY dd.created_date DESC

SELECT id, uuid, pm_cr_payment_id, pm_ip_payment_id, pm_amount, pm_funded, pm_status, pm_paid_date, pm_cleared_date, pm_escheat_date, pm_check_print_date, pm_check_number, pm_mail_tracking_number, pm_method_id, pm_monitored, pm_reject_payee_id, pm_reject_reason, pm_new_method, pm_orig_method, pm_selection, pm_method_last4digit, pm_re_issue, pm_error_code, pm_error_message, pm_carrier_id, pm_env, request_json, created_by, created_date
FROM dbo.int_claims_payments_audit

properties.description: This pipeline will copy objects from one group. The objects belonging to this group will be copied parallelly.

activities.name: ListObjectsFromOneGroup
activities.description: List objects from one group and iterate each of them to downstream activities

activities.name: RouteJobsBasedOnLoadingBehavior
activities.description: Check the loading behavior for each object if it requires full load or incremental load. If it is Default or FullLoad case, do full load. If it is DeltaLoad case, do incremental load.

activities.name: FullLoadOneObject
activities.description: Take a full snapshot on this object and copy it to the destination

activities.name: GetMaxWatermarkValue
activities.description: Query the source object to get the max value from watermark column

activities.name: DeltaLoadOneObject
activities.description: Copy the changed data only from last time via comparing the value in watermark column to identify changes.

defaultActivities.name: DefaultFullLoadOneObject
defaultActivities.description: Take a full snapshot on this object and copy it to the destination

activities.name: ListObjectsFromOneGroup

activities.name: FullLoadOneObject
activities.description: Take a full snapshot on this object and copy it to the destination

activities.name: GetMaxWatermarkValue
activities.description: Query the source object to get the max value from watermark column

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
  'SELECT COALESCE(',
    'CASE ',
      'WHEN T.max_updated IS NULL OR T.max_created >= T.max_updated THEN T.max_created ',
      'ELSE T.max_updated ',
    'END, ',
    '''1900-01-01T00:00:00.000Z''',
  ') AS CurrentMaxWaterMarkColumnValue ',
  'FROM (',
    'SELECT ',
      'MAX(',
        json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnName,
      ') AS max_created, ',
      'MAX(',
        json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnNameUpdate,
      ') AS max_updated ',
    'FROM ',
      json(item().SourceObjectSettings).schema,
      '.[',
      json(item().SourceObjectSettings).table,
      ']',
  ') AS T;'
)

activities.name: DeltaLoadOneObject
activities.description: Copy the changed data only from last time via comparing the value in watermark column to identify changes.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@{json(item().CustomScript).SelectStatement} [@{json(item().SourceObjectSettings).schema}].[@{json(item().SourceObjectSettings).table}] 
    where ([@{json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnName}] > @{if(contains(json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnType, 'Int'),
    json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnStartValue, 
    concat('''', json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnStartValue, ''''))}
    and [@{json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnName}] <= @{if(contains(json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnType, 'Int'),
    activity('GetMaxWatermarkValue').output.firstRow.CurrentMaxWaterMarkColumnValue, 
    concat('''', activity('GetMaxWatermarkValue').output.firstRow.CurrentMaxWaterMarkColumnValue, ''''))})
    or ([@{json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnNameUpdate}] > @{if(contains(json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnNameUpdatType, 'Int'),
    json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnStartValue, 
    concat('''', json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnStartValue, ''''))}
    and [@{json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnNameUpdate}] <= @{if(contains(json(item().DataLoadingBehaviorSettings).watermarkColumnNameUpdatType, 'Int'),
    activity('GetMaxWatermarkValue').output.firstRow.CurrentMaxWaterMarkColumnValue, 
    concat('''', activity('GetMaxWatermarkValue').output.firstRow.CurrentMaxWaterMarkColumnValue, ''''))})
